name: Container Text Flip
summary: A text component that cycles through words with smooth width transitions and blur-to-clear letter animations.
detailedDescription: Container Text Flip displays a rotating sequence of words with animated transitions between each word change. The component uses Framer Motion's layout animations to smoothly resize the container width based on the current word's measured width. Each word cycles automatically at a configurable interval, with letters animating in sequentially using a blur effect that transitions from blurred/transparent to sharp/visible. The container features a distinctive pill-shaped design with gradient backgrounds (light gray to white in light mode, dark gray tones in dark mode), inset shadows, and outer drop shadows. The text size is large by default (4xl on mobile, 7xl on desktop) with bold typography. Each letter animates independently with staggered delays, creating a wave-like reveal effect. This component is perfect for hero headings, value proposition rotators, or any context where you want to emphasize multiple related terms in sequence.
purpose: Display rotating keywords or phrases in a compact space
Create engaging word transitions with blur animations
Emphasize multiple value propositions or features sequentially
behavior: Automatically cycles through provided words array at set interval
Animates container width to fit each new word using layout animations
Reveals each letter with sequential blur-to-clear transition
Measures text width to calculate appropriate container size
Supports customizable interval, animation duration, and word list
visualCharacteristics: Inset and outer shadows for depth
Letters blur in sequentially with stagger timing
Light and dark mode gradient variations
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
